title: Urgent Opening Teacher at Jamboree Education Asia Pacific Associates

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Teacher at Jamboree Education Asia Pacific Associates
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Jamboree Education Asia Pacific Associates. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Teacher to strengthen our Delhi-based team.

About Jamboree Education Asia Pacific Associates:
Jamboree Education Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Support students with special educational needs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Pedagogy

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Flexible working hours
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Jamboree Education Asia Pacific Associates!
